ddls:
CREATE TABLE "car_rental_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the company (e.g., Alamo, Avis) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of car rental service (e.g., car rental agency, car sharing service) */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the company (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the location belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Geographic latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Geographic longitude of the location */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the location manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wikidata" (
  "wikidata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Wikidata entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the Wikidata entry belongs to */,
  "qid" TEXT /* Wikidata QID for the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Wikidata description for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Wikidata website for the company */,
  "wikimedia_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the Wikimedia image for the company */,
  "wikidata_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the company's headquarters in Wikidata */,
  "wikidata_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded according to Wikidata */,
  "wikidata_ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO according to Wikidata */,
  "wikidata_phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company according to Wikidata */,
  "wikidata_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company according to Wikidata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wikidata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wikidata_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logos" (
  "logo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each logo */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the logo belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the logo image */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of logo (e.g., Facebook, Twitter, Wikidata) */,
  "logo_source" TEXT /* Source of the logo (e.g., official website, social media) */,
  "logo_upload_date" TEXT /* Date the logo was uploaded or last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("logo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logos_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counts" (
  "count_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each count */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the count belongs to */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Number of locations for the company */,
  "last_update_date" TEXT /* Date when the count was last updated */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the count */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("count_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the tag belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the tag (e.g., amenity, brand) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the tag (e.g., car_rental, Alamo) */,
  "tag_source" TEXT /* Source of the tag (e.g., OpenStreetMap, internal) */,
  "tag_update_date" TEXT /* Date the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wikidata_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "wikidata_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Wikidata entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car rental company */,
  "link_source" TEXT /* Source of the link (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "link_update_date" TEXT /* Date the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wikidata_links_wikidata_id FOREIGN KEY ("wikidata_id") REFERENCES wikidata ("wikidata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wikidata_links_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES car_rental_companies ("company_id")
)
